## Problem
The admin panel still had ~5 pages that hadn't received the brand-token / hero-card treatment
applied to the other pages in nex-case-027. Additionally, `reports/DiscountTax.vue` and
`reports/PrintAudit.vue` had structural issues (bare wrappers, raw Tailwind, inline badge logic).

## Success Criterion
Changed pages render hero cards with `rounded-[26px]` / `border-black/8` pattern; no raw
`bg-emerald-*` / `text-rose-*` color classes in changed files; `npm run build` passes;
`php artisan test --compact` green (511 tests); PR merged to `dev`.

## Specialist Investigation & Implementation

Investigated all pages listed in `woosoo-nexus/handoff/IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOVER.md`. The majority
(reports/Index, DailySales, HourlySales, GuestCount, MenuItems, OrderStatus, EventLogs,
Permissions, Users/Index, Menus/Index, roles/IndexRoles, Admin/Settings, settings/Profile,
StatsCards) were **already aligned** from prior sessions and required no changes.

Five files genuinely needed work:

1. **Monitoring/Index.vue** ā€” Replaced two inline SVG path refresh icons with `RefreshCw` from
   `lucide-vue-next` for icon system consistency. Changed alert banner `rounded-lg` ā†’
   `rounded-[20px]` to match page card radii. Stuck-events inline banner likewise fixed.

2. **ServiceRequests/Index.vue** ā€” Removed stale `px-1 sm:px-2` wrapper padding (vestigial from
   pre-AppContentLayout era). Changed wrapper to `space-y-5`. Added Operations hero card before
   `DataTableToolbar`.

3. **branches/IndexBranches.vue** ā€” Replaced `p-6 space-y-6` wrapper with `space-y-5`. Added
   Configuration hero card with Add Branch CTA (preserving existing handler). Wrapped `DataTable`
   in standard table card pattern (`rounded-[26px] border border-black/8 bg-card/92`).

4. **reports/DiscountTax.vue** ā€” Replaced bare `p-6 space-y-6` wrapper with `space-y-5`. Replaced
   raw header `h1` with hero card (label: "Analytics Ā· Discount & Tax"). Applied brand table row
   and header classes. Replaced bare Period Summary `<div>` children with `rounded-[18px]` mini
   stat cards (six items).

5. **reports/PrintAudit.vue** ā€” Extracted `getStatusColor` helper (success/warning/destructive/
   secondary/outline variants) to replace verbose `v-if/v-else-if/v-else` badge chains.
   Confirmed table card wrapper already present; no structural changes needed.

## Code Simplification

- `reports/PrintAudit.vue`: extracted `getStatusColor` helper eliminates five-branch inline badge
  logic per row ā€” net simplification.
- `Monitoring/Index.vue`: inline SVG markup (multi-line `<path>` elements) replaced with single
  `<RefreshCw>` component ā€” net simplification, no dead code introduced.
- No dead-code introduced across the five files; no unused imports.
